resources.string: If you have a Seller account with us, please log in.
Please enter your Shop URL Key. For example \"my-shop-url\".
Please enter password with at least 8 chars.
Password and confirm password are not matching
Your seller account is under admin approval.
Please enter your email below and we will send you a new password.
You have no more orders to see
You Are Disapproved By The Admin
Catalog Input Type for Store Owner
Use In Search Results Layered Navigation
Visible On Product View Page On Front-End
Used For Sorting In Product Listing
If you do not specify an option value for a specific store view then the default (Admin) value will be used.
Default Value Can Only Be One
Both Attribute Code and Default label are required feilds.
You have no more Invoices to see
Are You Sure You Want To Delete This?
Can’t Connect . Please Check Your Network Connection.
Storage permission allows us to access data. Please allow in App Settings for additional functionality.
If Not found location CLICK HERE to get it on map.
New and confirm password did\'nt matched
Start Selling On Brass and Wood
Please Enter Email or Mobile Number
By Signing Up, you agree to
Do you want to show your current location
Please Create Products To View Analytics
Minimm 7 digits required for Account Number
Tap to Select Date from Calendar
Please select one of each of the ratings.
No Conversation has been done Yet..
Only one image can be select
Visible on Catalog Pages on Storefront
Used for Sorting in Product Listing
This option is not available in app.
Enter your mobile number and verify
Please enter a name consisting of lowercase English letters without spaces or special characters such as
Your password must be at least 8 characters. With at least 1 number and 1 special character
Do you really want to delete this?
You cannot select categories more than 3
How to create a merchant account
you can not select more than 10 images please deselect another image before tring to select again
Image should be less than 10 MB
The total amount due but not yet paid.
The total amount you ordered is still waiting for payment.
The total amount received for sales.
The payment request has been canceled due to returned requests. Please submit a new payment request
Do you want to delete account?
Apply single set of images to all SKUs
Apply unique images by attribute to each SKU
Skip image uploading at this time
Apply single price to all SKUs
Apply unique prices by attribute to each SKU
Apply single quantity to each SKUs
Apply unique quantity by attribute to each SKU
Step 2: Attribute Values\nSelect values from each attribute to include in this product. Each unique combination of values creates a unigue product SKU.
Step 3: Bulk Images, Price and Quantity\\nBased on your selections 3 new products will be created. Use this step to customize images and price for your new products.
Configurable products allow customers to choose options (Ex: shirt color). You need to create a simple product for each configuration (Ex: a product for each color).
Do You Want To Delete This Image
